topViolations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.34 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #4a90d9, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
